title: youngia corniculata
intro: Youngia corniculata, also known as the Chinese cress or hairy buplerum, is a plant species native to China and parts of Asia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Youngia corniculata include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Youngia corniculata is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
